CustomField.description: Optional Entra (AAD) user object id to attribute Agentforce-originated sessions to. Emitted as the invoke_agent span attribute user.id, which the ingest pipeline maps to CloudAppEvents UserKey — the key the M365 Admin Center uses to surface sessions/run-time. Leave blank to keep spans user-less (Defender-only, no Admin Center Activity).
CustomField.label: Run As User Id
